//: job-scout-pm v3 — zero-prompt permissions for unattended scans (spec §8.2).
//install: On the machine that runs the scheduled scans: copy this file to .claude/settings.json inside the job-scout-pm working directory (mkdir -p .claude && cp claude-settings.example.json .claude/settings.json). Shipped as an example rather than live config so cloning the repo never silently grants permissions.
//scope: Scoped to this repo: script execution, repo-local state/log writes, and the scripts' own outbound HTTP. No blanket skip-permissions flag; the cron fallback (claude -p) may additionally need --allowedTools set to the same list — a broader flag like --dangerously-skip-permissions trades safety for convenience and is NOT the default.
